targets.rawSQL: SELECT count(distinct session_id) as sessions FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo()))

SELECT coalesce(sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)),0) + coalesce(sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)),0) as tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(coalesce(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)),0), 4) as cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(avg(cast(duration_ms as bigint))/1000.0, 2) as seconds FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL

SELECT date(date_parse(event_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ')) as day, model, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as cost, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as input_tok, sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as output_tok FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1 DESC

SELECT model, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as input_tokens, sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as output_tokens, sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) as cache_read, sum(cast(cache_creation_tokens as bigint)) as cache_created FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

SELECT model, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model

SELECT 'Input' as type, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Output', sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Cache Read', sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Cache Created', sum(cast(cache_creation_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT terminal_type, count(distinct session_id) as sessions FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND terminal_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY terminal_type

SELECT round(cast(sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as double) / greatest(count(distinct session_id), 1), 0) as tps FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)) / greatest(count(distinct session_id), 1), 4) as cps FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(cast(sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) as double) / greatest(sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(cache_creation_tokens as bigint)), 1) * 100, 1) as cache_hit_pct FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(avg(cast(input_tokens as bigint) + cast(output_tokens as bigint)), 0) as avg_tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT event_timestamp as time, substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user, prompt as prompt, prompt_length as length FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'user_prompt' ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT event_timestamp as time, tool_name, decision, substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'tool_decision' ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC LIMIT 25
